chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3433 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 27.08.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Hyder Saleem, APG Sindh. Petitioner and his counsel are called absent. No intimation is received on their behalf. Since the CNS Act has been amended and proviso for bail has also been inserted in the Act, therefore, now the petitioner has been provided an alternate remedy to approach the trail Court for grant of bail. In view of this position, the instant petition being not maintainable is disposed of. The Petitioner may approach the trial Court for his relief. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq PS
